Agent Commission
Estimated Net Proceeds
Title fees based on real Northeast Ohio closings. Tax proration estimated at 9 months. Your actual net will vary — contact your agent for a precise net sheet.

📄 Doc Templates ?

Map a blank PDF form once — drop in the fields it needs. Agents then generate filled docs from any deal in one tap.

📦 Packages — save a set of docs (e.g. Offer Packet) for one-tap generate

Templates

📐 The PDF field editor works best on a desktop — placing fields precisely is tough on a phone.

New Package

Choose a document

↗ Share Template

Sends a copy into the recipient\u2019s library — fully theirs to edit. Templates live in a team\u2019s shared library, so sharing reaches that person\u2019s whole team.

Preview
This is exactly what gets sent.

Generate Document

Paste the loop's upload email — we'll remember it on this deal.
Listing Description Generator
✦ Claude AI
Upload the property tax sheet and Claude auto-fills the details — then generates your MLS description, social post, and email subject line.
Property Photo Analyzer
✦ Claude Vision
Upload a photo of any home component — roof, furnace, water heater, electrical panel, windows, foundation. Claude will estimate age, condition, and rough repair/replacement costs.
📷 Tap to upload a photo Roof · Furnace · Water heater · Windows · Electrical panel · Foundation · More Works with camera or photo library
🤝 Recommended Preferred Partners
⚠️ Always get a professional inspection
This tool helps you spot potential issues — not replace a licensed inspector. Flag anything for {agentFirst} and include it on the inspection checklist.
Offer Strategy
✦ Claude AI
Enter the details of a home you want to make an offer on. Claude will suggest a strategy — price, contingencies, terms — based on the market and your situation.
💬 After reviewing, send {agentFirst} a message with your thoughts. {agentFirst} will fine-tune the strategy and write the actual offer with you.
Neighborhood Intel
✦ Claude AI
Enter any address to get a deep dive on the neighborhood — schools, commute, vibe, what to know before you buy.
Top schools Safety Walkability Commute time Parks & outdoors Restaurants & shops Quiet / low traffic Community feel Property values trending up
Moving Checklist
Your complete move, phase by phase. Check items off as you go — your progress saves automatically on this device.
School District Lookup
✦ Claude AI
Enter any address to get school district info, school names, ratings, and what parents in the area say. Critical for families — and a major factor in home values.
💡 School district boundaries don't always match city lines. Always verify at GreatSchools.org and the district's website before making a decision.
Commute Calculator
✦ Claude AI
See your real commute time from any listing to your workplace — at rush hour, not Google Maps' optimistic estimate. One of the most overlooked factors in home buying.
Home Valuation
✦ Claude AI
Is this home priced right? Enter the details and Claude will give you an educated estimate of value based on the neighborhood, condition, and comparable sales — before you tour or offer.
Paste a listing URL to auto-fill address
Claude extracts the address from the URL
⚠️ This is an AI estimate for informational purposes — not an appraisal. For a precise market analysis, ask {agentFirst} for a formal CMA (Comparative Market Analysis). It's free and far more accurate.
Home Prep Analyzer
Claude Vision
Selling? Upload a room photo and Claude will tell you exactly what to do to make it show better — staging tips, quick fixes, declutter advice.
🏡 Tap to upload a room photo Living room · Kitchen · Master bed · Bathrooms · Entry · Garage
Complete Listing Prep Checklist
Our full room-by-room checklist to prepare your home for photos and showings.
AI Recommendations
✦ Personalized
Tell us about yourself and Claude will help clarify your priorities, sharpen your search, and give you actionable next steps.
What matters most in a home?
How do you feel about homes that need work?
Ideal home style?
Outdoor space?
Who is moving in?
Timeline to buy?
What cities or neighborhoods are you targeting? (type your own)
Where do you (or your partner) work? (for commute context)
Budget range?
Anything else your agent should know? (optional)

?

👤
My Agent Profile
Your photo, brokerage, and client-facing details.
👤
Tap ✏️ to upload a new photo
⭐
Booking & Reviews
Your scheduling and review links.
Used for the “Get Pre-Approved” button in your client emails. Leave blank to hide it.
🔌
Integrations
Connect ShowingTime, Zapier, and more.
Your personal lead email. Set it as the lead-notification address in Zillow, Clever, Realtor.com, etc. — or auto-forward your leads to it — and they drop into NestTrack automatically, assigned to you (or your team pool if routing is on). Keep it private — it's tied to your account.
Your lead email
Paste this into your lead source's notification/forwarding settings. New leads get read automatically — name, phone, email, and address pulled out for you.
Prefer a webhook URL? (for tools that POST leads)
POST a JSON body with name, email, phone, message. No headers, no IDs.
✍️
Bio & Email Signature
Your client-facing bio and email sign-off.
A headshot or logo — shows next to your signature in emails.
Paste the HTML your signature tool gives you (e.g. HiHello → Email Signature → copy HTML). It’s used exactly as-is on every email.
Preview
⚙️
Preferences
Notification settings.
🔒
Account
Change your password.
We’ll email a secure link to set a new password. It goes to your login email.
💵
Net Sheet Defaults
Powers your Seller Net Sheet. Defaults reflect a typical Ohio closing — adjust for your market. Leave blank to use defaults.
Dollars per $1,000 of sale price. Ohio default: 4.
% of annual property taxes the seller typically owes at closing. Ohio default: 75.
Flat estimate of total title/settlement costs. Tip: pull your last closing statement(s) and add up just the title fees (escrow, exam, closing, search, etc.). Default: 1495.
📹
Video Library
Loom, YouTube, BombBomb — any URL. Pick one when sending step emails.

Welcome to Nest Track
Your real estate platform is ready.

Watch this quick walkthrough to get up to speed on everything Nest Track can do for you and your clients.

Watch Later
Import Contacts from CSV
Upload any CSV — you'll match your columns on the next step. No need to format it first.
Match your columns
Tell us which of your CSV columns maps to each field. We guessed where we could.
Everyone in this upload gets tagged with this segment. If a segment has auto-enroll Smart Plans, they'll start automatically.
⬇ Download template CSV
⚠️ Duplicate emails found — review before importing:
Manage Segments
Delete segments you no longer need. Contacts tagged with a deleted segment keep their tag until you change it.
Invite to Portal
This sends an email with their signup link for Nest Track.
No email on file — add one to the contact first.
Add Video to Library

Subject
